title: VapourWare
description: Base mod that is the foundation for my modern mods. Contains shared code for fuel powered machines, and a wrench.
body:
# VapourWare
This mod is simply the shared code for my other recent mods, including the logic and framework for fuel consumption, storage, and use. Also included is the base code for machine blocks, tiles, containers, and screens though there is no implementation in this mod itself.
### Handyman's Wrench
This is the only tangible content that this mod adds. This wrench can be used to rotate anything that can be rotated (not tested with every block, results may vary) and is used to disassemble the fuel powered machines that the dependent mods add. Some machines have modes or functions that are interacted with using the wrench - these are documented in those mods.
